How We Work Results About Start your free discovery
Revenue Management

Pricing that captures what the market will pay.

Indi brings best-practice pricing and revenue management to your property, rates that move with demand, segmented to capture more of what’s out there.

Start your free discovery
The problem

Pricing that moves with the market, every day.

Demand shifts daily, events, weather, your comp set, the day of week, and the opportunity is to move with it. Rather than a season rate and a weekend rate with not much in between, Indi builds pricing that responds to real demand signals, so every night is priced to capture what the market will pay. It’s a full-time discipline, and it’s exactly what we bring to your property.

What Indi does

The actual work.

01

Pricing structure

A rate framework built for your property, not a generic template.

02

Rate plans & segmentation

The right rates for the right guests through the right channels.

03

Demand-based pricing

Moving rates with real demand signals, not the calendar.

04

Forecasting & performance

Reading the data and acting on it.

05

RMS implementation & optimisation

The right revenue management system, set up and run to best practice.

How it's delivered

Built in onboarding. Run at the intensity you choose.

Your revenue management strategy is built in onboarding. How actively it’s then run depends on your tier: Monthly and Weekly partnerships actively manage your pricing as the market moves, where the most upside lives, while Quarterly provides strategic oversight and course-correction rather than active yield management. Need only the system set up? We run RMS / dynamic pricing implementation as a standalone project.

No group can honestly promise you a number, and we won't pretend otherwise. What we can promise is the discipline and expertise that gives your property the best shot at strong performance.

See how we work See standalone projects
Proof

Proof, honestly framed.

The best evidence is the owners we work with, and the results a direct-first strategy produces across our group. You’ll find their words, and a monthly snapshot, on the Results page.

Joining Indi Hotels has been a major step forward in the success of our business. After many years of being a member of a major brand, being inundated with the ever increasing costs, we decided to partner with Indi Hotels and go independent. Indi Hotels has been fantastic to deal with, giving exceptional advice and support. We highly recommend Indi Hotels to any owners looking to take their business to the next level.

David Pratt · Owner · Southgate Motel

See client results
